title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
